arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Valencia vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Can Madrid match Valencia’s intensity and earn the three points at Mestalla while also retaking control of the 2024-25 La Liga table? Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Valencia, the first of the year.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid could miss out on long-time transfer target to Brighton
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid could well find themselves beaten to the punch in the race for Palmeiras talent and long-time transfer target Vitor Reis. That’s according to The Athletic,…

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid defender joins Espanyol
arts.sum: Espanyol have on Friday announced a defensive signing by way of La Liga rivals Real Madrid. The player to have put pen to paper on terms with the Periquitos for…

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos backs German starlet to join Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Toni Kroos has this week thrown his backing behind fellow countryman Florian Wirtz, to one day take his talents to Spain’s capital. The name of youngster Wirtz…

arts.ttl: Liverpool reject Crystal Palace's £15m bid for in-form star... just days after turning down Real Madrid's £20m approach for Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool have had a number of proposals from Premier League and European sides showing interest in the youngster. The level of offers have so far fallen well short of Liverpool's valuation.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad star to undergo Valencia medical on Friday
arts.sum: An out-of-favour member of the attacking ranks at Real Sociedad is all set to link up with La Liga rivals Valencia this month. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…

arts.ttl: Alexander-Arnold issues Liverpool DEMANDS amid Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is reportedly willing to snub Real Madrid if Liverpool are prepared to meet two of his demands. Alexander-Arnold issues Liverpool DEMANDS amid Real Madrid interest

arts.ttl: Valencia vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Valencia in what’s expected to be a thrilling, consequential match for both teams. This match has always been very tough for Real Madrid, no matter Valencia’s recent performances.

arts.ttl: Valencia vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has some of his depth back with players like Rodrygo, Tchouameni, Camavinga or Mendy all available, but he will have to wait a few extra weeks before Alaba can feature in the lineup. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Tchouameni, Rudiger, Camavinga, Valverde, Ceballos, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shuts down Alexander-Arnold and Real Madrid rumors
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has had his say on Trent Alexander-Arnold’s current situation and the rumors linking him with a move away from the club to Real Madrid, even in the winter transfer window. Slot also revealed he had had a conversation with the player: “I talk to all the players, and it’s the same with Trent, so yes, I’ve talked to him.
